emails.subject: RE: RACE RESULTS - Heights 5K
emails.body: RE: RACE RESULTS Heights 5K I have no idea what my finish time was. It was somewhere in the 32:00 range....is there a website that I can look this up at? Thanks. To: 'EnronRunners@enron.com'

emails.subject: RE: RACE RESULTS - Heights 5K
emails.body: An estimate works fine for the ERC. As far as I know the site that usually posts results, <URL> only posted the top 3 spots in each age group. To: Richardson, Cindy

emails.subject: RE: RACE RESULTS - Heights 5K
emails.body: Ha. I will definitely not be on that list. Lets just say 32:30. I was just focused on not puking when I crossed the finish so all I could make out was a big 32 on the clock. Thanks. To: Sanchez, Monique
